# Skill Routing Table

> **⚠️ Source of truth**: `rules/skill-routing.yaml`. This Markdown file
> is a human-readable mirror generated by `scripts/gen_skill_routing_md.py`.
> If the two disagree, the YAML wins. When adding or changing a route,
> edit the YAML and regenerate this file.

Routing is performed by `pipeline/skills/router.py` (deterministic code), not by the agent. Agents receive the resolved skill list in the system prompt and must NOT re-match this table themselves.

Three tiers:

1. **Baseline** — unconditional, every Go service change reads these.
2. **Conditional** — mandatory when the trigger keyword fires.
3. **Routes** — weight-based top-K recall for the rest.

## Tier-0: Baseline (unconditional)

Every Go service change in `demo-app/` reads these. The router adds them to the skill list without any matching.

| Skill | Reason |
|-------|--------|
| `skills/framework/kratos.md` | Kratos 四层布局是 demo-app 所有产物的硬约束，违反即构建失败 |
| `skills/lang/error.md` | 所有 handler / usecase 必须遵守 errors proto + wrap 规范 |
| `skills/governance/observability.md` | trace_id 跨层透传是刚需，断链即失观测 |
| `skills/governance/logging.md` | 结构化 JSON 日志 + PII 脱敏，所有服务统一基线 |

## Tier-1: Conditional (trigger fires → mandatory)

When any of the listed keywords appears in the demand text (case-insensitive substring), the router marks the skill as mandatory. These are **not** subject to top-K truncation.

| Skill | Trigger Keywords | Reason |
|-------|------------------|--------|
| `skills/transport/http.md` | http, api, rest, router, middleware, 接口, 路由, 中间件, request, response, openapi, google.api.http, 对外接口, 后端接口, endpoint, 端点 | 需求涉及对外 HTTP / REST API，http.md 定义注解路由与错误码映射 |
| `skills/infra/database.md` | mysql, postgresql, sql, gorm, database, orm, transaction, migration, 数据库, 数据表, 表结构, 事务, 建表, 加字段, 新字段, 新增字段, 改表结构, 字段, 持久化, 落库, 索引, index | 需求涉及表结构 / 事务 / 持久化，database.md 定义 SQL 注入防御与事务边界 |
| `skills/infra/config.md` | config, 配置, env, environment, secret, 密钥, dotenv, .env, 开关, 阈值, feature flag, 参数配置, 环境变量 | 需求引入新配置 / 开关 / 阈值，config.md 定义启动校验与密钥处理 |
| `skills/lang/python-comments.md` | larkflow, pipeline/, tests/, scripts/, pytest, 注释规范, docstring, python 注释, 改 pipeline, 改 tests | 改动落在 LarkFlow Python 代码区，必须遵守注释 / docstring 规范 |
| `skills/transport/pagination.md` | 列表, 列表页, list endpoint, 分页, pagination, page, cursor, offset, limit, 翻页, 分批 | 涉及列表 / 分页 API，pagination.md 定义游标分页与稳定排序 |
| `skills/governance/idempotency.md` | 幂等, idempotency, idempotent, dedup, 去重, 重放, webhook, 回调, callback, at-least-once, 重复提交, 消费消息, mq 消费 | 涉及回调 / 消费 / 重复提交场景，idempotency.md 定义幂等键与响应持久化 |

## Tier-2: Routes (weight-based top-K)

Keyword substring match; multiple matches are sorted by `weight` DESC and the router keeps the top K (default K = 5). Business skills (`skills/domain/*`) tie-break by winning generic ones.

| Keywords / Domain | Ref File | Weight | Description |
|-------------------|----------|--------|-------------|
| Redis, Cache, 缓存, 分布式锁, Expiration, TTL, 热点 | `skills/infra/redis.md` | 1.0 | Redis client, key expiration, pipelines |
| gRPC, RPC, 服务间调用, 内部调用, Protobuf, Proto service, Metadata, Errors proto, 服务调用 | `skills/transport/rpc.md` | **1.1** | Kratos transport/grpc, 客户端拦截器, 超时/metadata 透传, errors 映射 |
| MQ, 消息队列, Message Queue, Kafka, RocketMQ, RabbitMQ, Pulsar, NATS JetStream, Producer, Consumer, Topic, 分区, Offset, 位点, DLQ, Outbox, 事件驱动, Event-driven | `skills/transport/mq.md` | **1.1** | 投递语义 (at-least-once)、手动 commit offset、分区键顺序、DLQ、Kratos consumer server、outbox 模式 |
| 熔断, Circuit Breaker, 重试, Retry, 降级, Resilience, 超时预算, Timeout Budget, 退避, Backoff, 韧性 | `skills/governance/resilience.md` | 1.0 | 超时预算、指数退避+jitter、Kratos circuitbreaker、重试/熔断/限流的链路顺序 |
| 服务发现, Discovery, Registry, etcd, Nacos, Consul, Zookeeper, 注册中心, 负载均衡, p2c, 灰度 | `skills/governance/service_discovery.md` | 1.0 | Kratos registry 抽象、discovery:// DSN、p2c 默认 LB、优雅下线与灰度 |
| Goroutine, Concurrency, 并发, Async, WaitGroup, errgroup, Channel, Context, 协程 | `skills/lang/concurrency.md` | 1.0 | Goroutine lifecycle, context cancellation |
| Auth, 认证, 授权, Login, 登录, JWT, Session, OAuth, RBAC, 权限, 鉴权 | `skills/governance/auth.md` | 1.0 | JWT pinning, middleware placement, constant-time compare |
| Rate Limit, 限流, Throttle, 令牌桶, 429, Quota, 频控 | `skills/governance/rate_limit.md` | 1.0 | Per-identity limiting, 429 semantics, Redis-backed counters |
| 订单, Order, 下单, 购物车, Checkout, 超卖, 库存, 商品 | `skills/domain/order.md` | **1.2** | 电商订单状态机、接口幂等、防超卖 |
| 用户, User, Account, 注册, Register, 登录, Login, 密码, Password, 爆破, 昵称, Profile | `skills/domain/user.md` | **1.2** | 密码 bcrypt、登录防爆破、注册幂等、风控 |
| 支付, Payment, Refund, 退款, 对账, 回调, Callback, Stripe, 微信支付, 支付宝, 结算 | `skills/domain/payment.md` | **1.2** | 回调验签 + 幂等、金额 int64、状态机、对账 |

**Path Prefix**: `skills/` (relative to the workspace root)
